cases.title: Organizer Admin configures feedback as mandatory during event creation in Draft
preconditions: Authenticated OrganizerAdmin actor with organization scope
Valid create payload with ruleConfig.feedbackRequired set to true
ruleConfig.feedbackOpenAt and ruleConfig.feedbackCloseAt are ISO-8601 timestamps where openAt < closeAt
Other ruleConfig windows are chronologically consistent
steps: Invoke eventService.create with name, basic fields, and ruleConfig including feedbackRequired true and feedback window
Read persisted event_rule_configs row linked to the new event
cases.expected: Event is created in Draft state; event_rule_configs.feedback_required is true; feedback_open_at and feedback_close_at equal configured values; satisfies Workflow A step 2 (admin configures EventRuleConfig including feedback policy)

cases.title: POST /events persists feedbackRequired true and GET detail returns mandatory policy
preconditions: OrganizerAdmin JWT scoped to the organization
POST body includes ruleConfig with feedbackRequired true and valid feedbackOpenAt/feedbackCloseAt
steps: POST /api/v1/events with Authorization bearer and ruleConfig.feedbackRequired true in JSON body
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId} with the same organizer token
cases.expected: POST returns HTTP 200 with ruleConfig.feedbackRequired true in the entity snapshot; GET detail returns feedbackRequired true and matching feedback window on the linked EventRuleConfig

cases.title: Organizer Admin configures feedback as optional during event creation
preconditions: Authenticated OrganizerAdmin actor with organization scope
Valid create payload with ruleConfig.feedbackRequired set to false
Valid feedback window timestamps present for post-event collection
steps: Invoke eventService.create with ruleConfig.feedbackRequired false
Read event_rule_configs.feedback_required for the new event
cases.expected: EventRuleConfig persists feedback_required false; organizer has configured optional feedback policy per FR-18

cases.title: Organizer Admin updates feedbackRequired on Draft event before registration opens
preconditions: Existing event in Draft state with feedbackRequired false
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin actor with event scope
Registration has not yet been opened
steps: Invoke eventService.update(eventId, { ruleConfig: { feedbackRequired: true } }, organizerAdminContext)
Read event_rule_configs.feedback_required for the event
cases.expected: Update succeeds without mandatory reason payload; persisted feedback_required is true; no AUDIT_REQUIRED_FOR_CRITICAL_CHANGE error because registration is not yet open

cases.title: Organizer Admin toggles mandatory/optional feedback in event setup Section 5
preconditions: Web app running with organizer authenticated as OrganizerAdmin
Organizer navigates to event create or edit flow
steps: Complete Sections 1–4 of event setup (basic details, capacity, registration window, check-in window)
In Section 5 (feedback and certificate rule settings), enable mandatory feedback toggle and set feedback open/close times
Save draft and reopen event edit view
cases.expected: UI persists and displays mandatory feedback enabled with configured feedback window; Section 5 feedback policy controls are editable by Organizer Admin per forms layout

cases.title: Testing-plan §3 eligibility pass/fail reflects mandatory feedbackRequired config
preconditions: Event completed with ruleConfig.feedbackRequired true
Participant registration in Attended state with no Feedback submission
Eligibility evaluation triggered post-completion
steps: Run eligibilityEvaluator for the attended participant without feedback
Inspect CertificateEligibility result and reason payload
cases.expected: Testing-plan §3 eligibility row satisfied: outcome is NotEligible with reason code NOT_ELIGIBLE_FEEDBACK or FEEDBACK_REQUIRED per BR-14 and BR-18; passAllRules guard fails because feedback is mandatory but incomplete

cases.title: Optional feedback config does not block eligibility when feedback absent
preconditions: Event completed with ruleConfig.feedbackRequired false
Participant registration in Attended state with valid registration and no Feedback submission
Other baseline eligibility rules satisfied
steps: Run eligibilityEvaluator for the attended participant without feedback
Inspect CertificateEligibility result
cases.expected: Eligibility can resolve to Eligible when attendance criteria pass; feedback absence does not fail passAllRules because feedbackRequired is false

cases.title: GET eligibility/me reflects mandatory feedback policy from event rule config
preconditions: Two E2E fixture events completed with identical attendance but different feedbackRequired (true vs false)
Same participant attended both events and submitted feedback for neither
Participant JWT
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{mandatoryEventId}/eligibility/me with participant token
GET /api/v1/events/{optionalEventId}/eligibility/me with participant token
cases.expected: Mandatory-event response is NotEligible with feedback-related reason; optional-event response is Eligible when attendance alone satisfies BR-17; demonstrates FR-18 config drives deterministic eligibility outcomes

cases.title: Flow A lifecycle with mandatory feedbackRequired blocks eligibility without submission
preconditions: E2E Flow A progressed: draft created with feedbackRequired true, published, registered, checked in, event completed
Participant Attended with feedback window open but no feedback submitted
Participant and OrganizerAdmin tokens from prior flow steps
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId} and confirm ruleConfig.feedbackRequired true
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility/me with participant token after event completion
cases.expected: Flow A completes through check-in and completion; eligibility/me returns NotEligible with feedback-related reason because mandatory feedback policy configured at draft persists through lifecycle

cases.title: OrganizerStaff cannot change feedbackRequired policy
preconditions: Event in Draft or Published state
Authenticated OrganizerStaff actor assigned to the event
Staff lacks Configure rules/capacity/windows permission per roles matrix
steps: Attempt eventService.update(eventId, { ruleConfig: { feedbackRequired: true } }, staffContext)
Verify event_rule_configs.feedback_required unchanged
cases.expected: Update rejected with EVENT_RULE_CHANGE_FORBIDDEN or HTTP 403; feedback_required remains at prior value; BR-21 enforced

cases.title: Participant cannot modify event feedback policy via PATCH
preconditions: Published event with feedbackRequired false
Authenticated participant JWT with no organizer role
steps: PATCH /api/v1/events/{eventId} with body { ruleConfig: { feedbackRequired: true } } using participant token
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId} as OrganizerAdmin
cases.expected: PATCH returns HTTP 403; event ruleConfig.feedbackRequired unchanged; only OrganizerAdmin may configure feedback policy

cases.title: Changing feedbackRequired after registration opens requires audit with reason
preconditions: Event in RegistrationOpen state with feedbackRequired false
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin actor
steps: Attempt eventService.update(eventId, { ruleConfig: { feedbackRequired: true } }, organizerAdminContext) without reasonCode or reasonText
Retry update with mandatory reasonCode and reasonText per sensitive action guardrails
cases.expected: First attempt fails with AUDIT_REQUIRED_FOR_CRITICAL_CHANGE or equivalent; second attempt succeeds, feedback_required becomes true, and audit record persisted with before/after diff per BR-22

cases.title: Reject feedback policy save when feedback window has openAt >= closeAt
preconditions: OrganizerAdmin JWT
Draft event create or update payload with feedbackRequired true
feedbackOpenAt equal to or after feedbackCloseAt
steps: POST /api/v1/events or PATCH /api/v1/events/{eventId} with invalid feedback window while setting feedbackRequired
Verify no event_rule_configs row created or updated with invalid window
cases.expected: HTTP 400 with deterministic invalid-input error code; feedback_required and window are not persisted; satisfies TimeWindow invariant openAt < closeAt

cases.title: Toggle feedbackRequired from mandatory to optional after registration open increments config version
preconditions: Event RegistrationOpen with feedbackRequired true and config version N
OrganizerAdmin provides valid reason for critical change
steps: Update ruleConfig.feedbackRequired to false with reason payload
Read event_rule_configs.version and feedback_required
cases.expected: feedback_required becomes false; version increments to N+1; prior mandatory policy no longer blocks eligibility for participants who omit feedback

cases.title: Concurrent feedbackRequired updates after registration open produce consistent config
preconditions: Event RegistrationOpen with feedbackRequired false
Two parallel update requests from authorized OrganizerAdmin with distinct reason payloads
steps: Launch two parallel eventService.update calls toggling feedbackRequired differently against real Postgres
Read event_rule_configs and audit logs after both settle
cases.expected: Exactly one update wins; final feedback_required and version are consistent; no partial config state; audit log contains single critical-change record for the successful update

cases.title: Critical feedbackRequired change after registration open writes immutable audit record
preconditions: Event RegistrationOpen
OrganizerAdmin JWT with valid reasonCode and reasonText
steps: PATCH /api/v1/events/{eventId} setting feedbackRequired from false to true with reason payload
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/audit-logs?entityType=EventRuleConfig
cases.expected: Audit record includes actorId, actorRole OrganizerAdmin, action event.rule_config.updated, entityType EventRuleConfig, before.feedbackRequired false, after.feedbackRequired true, reasonCode, reasonText, and occurredAt timestamp

cases.title: Eligibility evaluation order applies feedbackRequired before final result persist
preconditions: Fixed clock and seeded fixture per testing plan deterministic controls
Event with feedbackRequired true; attended participant without feedback
steps: Run eligibility evaluation pipeline twice with identical inputs
Compare reason_code and result across both runs
cases.expected: Both runs produce identical NotEligible outcome with same feedback-related reason; validation step 2 (validate feedback requirement) executes before persist per validation pipeline

cases.title: Feedback completion tracker shows mandatory outstanding count when feedbackRequired true
preconditions: OrganizerAdmin logged in on operational dashboard for an in-progress or completed event
Event configured with feedbackRequired true
At least one attended participant has not submitted feedback
steps: Navigate to organizer feedback completion tracker component
Observe mandatory feedback outstanding count and completion ratio
cases.expected: Tracker displays non-zero mandatory feedback outstanding count and completion ratio reflecting participants missing required feedback per event-specific Feedback completion tracker spec

cases.title: Event dashboard exposes configured feedback policy for organizer review
preconditions: Event with feedbackRequired true and valid feedback window
OrganizerAdmin JWT authorized for dashboard
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/dashboard with organizer token
Verify feedback policy section or rule summary in response
cases.expected: Dashboard returns HTTP 200 with feedbackRequired true and feedback window metadata so organizer can confirm mandatory policy is active per FR-22 operational overview
